pageDescription: Calculate how long it will take to pay off your credit card debt and interest with different payment strategies to minimize costs and become debt-free faster

interest.title: Credit Card Interest
interest.description: Credit card interest compounds daily, making debt grow quickly if not paid off

minimumPayments.title: Minimum Payment Impact
minimumPayments.description: Paying only minimums can extend payoff time for years and cost hundreds in interest

strategies.title: Payoff Strategies
strategies.description: Fixed payments or extra payments significantly reduce payoff time and interest costs

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides credit card payoff estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual payoff terms may vary based on card issuer policies and fees

importantNotesList: Credit card interest compounds daily, increasing the cost of carrying a balance
Paying more than minimums directly reduces principal and saves on interest
Consider balance transfer offers to consolidate high-interest credit card debt
Stop using credit cards while paying off existing balances

messages.enterInformation: Enter your credit card information to calculate payoff time
messages.resultMessage: Your credit card payoff calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides credit card payoff estimates based on mathematical calculations. Actual payoff terms, interest charges, and fees may vary based on card issuer policies and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized credit card debt management and consolidation advice, consult credit counselors or financial advisors with expertise in debt reduction and individual financial circumstances.

errors.currentBalance: Please enter a valid current balance
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.minimumPayment: Please enter a valid minimum payment
errors.fixedPayment: Please enter a valid fixed payment amount
errors.extraPayment: Please enter a valid extra payment amount
errors.minimumPaymentType: Please select a minimum payment type

tooltips.currentBalance: Current outstanding balance on your credit card
tooltips.interestRate: Annual Percentage Rate (APR) charged on unpaid balances
tooltips.minimumPayment: Required minimum monthly payment from card issuer
tooltips.minimumPaymentType: Whether minimum payment is fixed amount or percentage of balance
tooltips.fixedPayment: Fixed amount you plan to pay each month
tooltips.extraPayment: Additional amount paid each month toward principal
tooltips.paymentStrategy: Method used to determine monthly payment amount

total_monthly_budget_for_all_credit_card: Total Monthly Budget for All Credit Card Payments
showing_first_24_months_download_csv_for: Showing first 24 months. Download CSV for complete schedule.
enter_your_credit_card_information_to_se: Enter your credit card information to see your payoff strategy
extra_payment_goes_to_the_card_with_the_: Extra payment goes to the card with the highest APR
cards_are_prioritized_by_apr_highest_fir: Cards are prioritized by APR (highest first), with balance as a tiebreaker (lowest first)
strategy_pay_minimums_175_put_extra_225_: • Strategy: Pay minimums ($175), put extra $225 toward Card B (higher APR)
strategy_pay_minimums_290_put_extra_210_: • Strategy: Pay minimums ($290), put extra $210 toward Card B (highest APR)
